mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 10% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as investors price in recession risks.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 10% threshold, or the signal's IC drops below -0.05 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and GDP signals strong real economic activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate earnings prospects.
failure_condition: The joint growth of INDPRO and GDPC1 fails to produce positive 60d returns in > 40% of cases, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts combined with rising consumer spending signals strong demand-side momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days during post-shock recovery phases.
failure_condition: The combined HOUST/RSAFS signal fails to predict positive 20d returns in > 30% of cases, or the interaction term's IC falls below 0.02 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 100k per month indicates robust labor market conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through increased consumer spending and corporate investment.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100k, or the signal's IC drops below 0.04 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production above 100.5 indicates expanding manufacturing activity, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate margins.
failure_condition: The INDPRO signal fails to predict positive 20d returns in > 40% of cases, or the series' IC drops below 0.03 in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation combined with low interest rates creates a 'stagflation' risk scenario, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as central banks face policy dilemmas.
failure_condition: The CPIAUCSL/FEDFUNDS interaction fails to predict negative 60d returns in > 35% of cases, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent monetary tightening cycles, indicated by rising federal funds rates above 4%, lead to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as borrowing costs constrain corporate and consumer activity.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4%, or the signal's IC drops below -0.04 in rolling 1-year windows.
